title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Whirlpool India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Whirlpool India
jsonLd.description:
Whirlpool India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
